titles.text: 戦国サイバー 藤丸地獄変

descriptions.text: Sengoku Cyber - Fujimaru Jigokuhen is a tactical strategy role-playing game that follows the ninja Fujimaru and his ninja clan.

The story is about the ninja Fujimaru that got a group of ninjas and have to complete different missions to gain money for their clan, with that money they can buy new weapons and items, or different thing to improve their habilities. Between missions the player can train his ninjas doing different kind of trainings (like farming, weapons, climbing, magic, etc).
